heading: Exchange of documents by heads of departments
label: 1721 Exchange of documents by heads of departments
text: Heads of departments may exchange surplus documents for other documents and books required by them, when it is to the advantage of the public service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 93 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 9528 Stat. 623
